cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates are selected based on the highest scores from the shortlist, ensuring they align well with the most frequent digits per position. The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers, and the top50 includes these plus other high scoring candidates without duplicates, reflecting recent digit frequency trends.
